rulings.Case Title: JOANNE O. DENHAM et al VS. DOUGLASS INSULATION CO., INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Why This Court Should Not Impose Sanctions (Per Ruling From 02/01/12 Discovery Hearing)
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, March 8, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Order to show cause regarding the imposition of sanctions in connection with The Scotts Co.¿s motion for the court¿s appointment of Dr. Roggli as an expert witness pursuant to Evidence Code 730: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:45am. Defendant¿s request to remove this hearing from the court¿s calendar is denied. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. Defendant must bring a proposed order to the hearing. = (503/TLJ)
